login.title: Log in
login.emptyFields: Please enter your email and password.
login.unverifiedBanner: Your account is not verified. Request a new verification email below.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.
signup.defaultSuccess: Account created. Please check your email to verify your account before logging in.

resend.defaultSuccess: If an account needs verification, a new email has been sent.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.defaultSuccess: Email verified — your account is ready to use.
verify.missingBanner: No verification token was found in this link. You can request a new verification email below.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.intro: Enter your account email and we’ll send you a link to choose a new password.
forgot.defaultSuccess: If an account exists for that address, a password reset link has been sent.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.
reset.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
reset.defaultSuccess: Your password has been reset. Please log in with your new password.
reset.missingBanner: No reset token was found in this link. Request a new password reset below.
